---
title: "Hofs"
editor: visual
---

## "For the First Time in the Western Hemisphere and the for the First Time in 1000 Years Anywhere."

```{=html}
<iframe width="700" height="600" allow="local-network-access; geolocation" title="United States Map_Zipcodes" src="https://virginiatech.maps.arcgis.com/apps/mapviewer/index.html?configurableview=true&webmap=f934dee620c8416591817035ea6e8ed5&theme=dark&heading=true&legend=true&share=true&scroll=false&center=-94.01292402287636,38.87449604116849&scale=36978595.474472" ></iframe>
```

## Perceptions of Hofs and the Future of the AFA

### Thors Hof

### Baldrs Hof

### Njords Hof

### Freys Hof
